title: tanacetum leucanthemum
intro: Tanacetum leucanthemum, also known as tansy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of tansy include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and soothe respiratory problems, such as asthma. Tansy can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
